registered_positive_cases: finite symbolic transition package with total decoder
distributed graph encoding with inventoried scheduler and stores
probabilistic representation with effective sampling and exact query semantics
learned finite-parameter model with effective inference and declared codebook
registered_negative_cases: package with a hidden external history store
decoder that silently diverges on a registered query
encoding whose object identities change between equivalent executions
registered_unknown_cases: opaque learned representation with unresolved support inventory
claimed effective package whose construction procedure is unavailable
